// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{
    private static readonly string[] _keys = new string[] {
        "a", "item", "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"
    };


    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int len = key.Length;
        if (len < 1u || len > 255u)
            return false;


        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
        {
            if (StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[i]))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const uint ItemCount = 3;
    public const uint MinKeyLength = 1;
    public const uint MaxKeyLength = 255;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
